commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=70bfb7deca947e52b5f5f7415d10d442cf6cf5ea)
commands.review_summary:
The PR scopes browser-local assistant avatar overrides by agent id across Control UI storage/render/bootstrap paths and also adds an unrelated `/export-session` backend-delegated warning in exported HTML.

PR surface: Source +42, Tests +122. Total +164 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main stores assistant avatar overrides under one localStorage key and render/controller/bootstrap paths read it without an agent id, matching the linked issue steps. I did not run a browser flow in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review should decide whether to repair this branch or prefer the parallel PR, because the contributor still needs real UI proof and the branch contains an unrelated broken export-session change.

target.title: fix(ui): scope local assistant avatar override to agent ID (fixes #90890)
target.body:
## Summary

Local assistant avatar overrides were stored under a single global `localStorage` key (`openclaw.control.assistant.v1`), so setting an avatar for one agent changed it for all agents. This PR scopes the override to the current agent ID.

## Changes

- `ui/src/ui/storage.ts`: `loadLocalAssistantIdentity` / `saveLocalAssistantIdentity` now accept an optional `agentId` parameter. When provided, the storage key becomes `openclaw.control.assistant.v1:<agentId>`.
- `ui/src/ui/controllers/assistant-identity.ts`: Threads `state.assistantAgentId` through `loadAssistantIdentity` and `setAssistantAvatarOverride`.
- `ui/src/ui/app-render.ts`: Passes `state.assistantAgentId` when loading / saving the local avatar override.
- `ui/src/ui/controllers/control-ui-bootstrap.ts`: Applies the agent-scoped local override during bootstrap.

## Backward compatibility

When no `agentId` is provided, the functions still fall back to the legacy global key, preserving existing behavior for unscoped callers.

## Verification

- `pnpm test ui/src/ui/controllers/assistant-identity.test.ts` — passed (6 tests)
- `pnpm test ui/src/ui/app-render.assistant-avatar.test.ts` — passed (16 tests)
- `pnpm test ui/src/ui/views/config-quick.test.ts` — passed (14 tests)
- `pnpm test ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts` — passed (20 tests)
- `pnpm test ui/src/ui/controllers/control-ui-bootstrap.test.ts` — passed (10 tests)

Fixes #90890
target.author: xydigit-sj
